violations.text: The blade of the slicer was observed to be in poor repair (chipped blade). The equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The ceiling in the back warewashing/prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

The following equipment was observed in poor repair: 1.vegetable slicer blade was chipped/warped. 2.handsink located near prep table is missing a splash guard. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
